name: youtube-subtitle-collage
description: Generate a dark-themed subtitle collage image from a YouTube video — preserves actual spoken words as timestamped quote cards. Use when the user wants to make a 字幕拼接图 or show real quotes from a video.
author: HappyCapy

commands.name: youtube-subtitle-collage
commands.description: Extract subtitle segments from YouTube and render them as a visual quote collage
